feedback_files.tests/test_clock_feedback.py:
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from billing_clock import next_monthly_run
from settlement_runner import next_scheduled_run


def test_month_end_uses_last_real_day_of_short_month():
    after = datetime(2025, 2, 1, 9, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)

    assert next_monthly_run(after, 31, 6) == datetime(
        2025, 2, 28, 6, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc
    )


def test_runner_converts_completion_instant_before_scheduling():
    result = next_scheduled_run(
        "2025-01-15T23:30:00+00:00",
        billing_day=15,
        hour=20,
        minute=0,
        timezone_name="America/Los_Angeles",
    )

    assert result == "2025-01-15T20:00:00-08:00"
